code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [CloudNative_Serverless] --> Idle: Pet Created
    
    Idle --> Washing: Start Wash Button
    
    state Washing {CloudNative_ServiceMesh] --> TimerRunning
        TimerRunning --> CalculateRemaining: Every 0.5s
        CalculateRemaining --> TimerRunning: remaining > 0
        CalculateRemaining --> TimerComplete: remaining ≤ 0
        
        state TimerRunning {CloudNative_DockerImage] --> SaveState
            SaveState --> UpdateUI
            UpdateUI --> SaveState: Loop
            
            note right of SaveState
                UserDefaults:
                - endTime: Date
                - type: .wash
                - petID: UUID
            end note
        }
        
        state TimerComplete {CloudNative_K8sCluster] --> CancelTimer
            CancelTimer --> ClearState
            ClearState --> SendNotification
            SendNotification --> [CloudNative_K8sCluster]
        }
    }
    
    Washing --> WashComplete: Timer Expires
    
    WashComplete --> Drying: Start Dry Button
    
    state Drying {CloudNative_DockerImage] --> TimerRunning2
        TimerRunning2 --> CalculateRemaining2: Every 0.5s
        CalculateRemaining2 --> TimerRunning2: remaining > 0
        CalculateRemaining2 --> TimerComplete2: remaining ≤ 0
        
        state TimerRunning2 {CloudNative_HelmChart] --> SaveState2
            SaveState2 --> UpdateUI2
            UpdateUI2 --> SaveState2: Loop
            
            note right of SaveState2
                UserDefaults:
                - endTime: Date
                - type: .dry
                - petID: UUID
            end note
        }
        
        state TimerComplete2 {CloudNative_ServiceMesh] --> CancelTimer2
            CancelTimer2 --> ClearState2
            ClearState2 --> SendNotification2
            SendNotification2 --> [CloudNative_ServiceMesh]
        }
    }
    
    Drying --> DryComplete: Timer Expires
    
    DryComplete --> Folding: Ready to Fold State
    
    Folding --> CycleComplete: User Taps Fold
    
    state CycleComplete {CloudNative_ServiceMesh] --> UpdatePetHealth
        UpdatePetHealth --> UpdateStats
        UpdateStats --> ClearNotifications
        ClearNotifications --> SaveDatabase
        SaveDatabase --> [CloudNative_HelmChart]
        
        note right of UpdatePetHealth
            Pet Updates:
            - health = 100
            - state = .happy
            - lastLaundryDate = now
            - cyclesCompleted += 1
            - streak updated
        end note
    }
    
    CycleComplete --> Idle: Return to Idle
    
    Washing --> RecoveryCheck: App Reopened
    Drying --> RecoveryCheck: App Reopened
    
    state RecoveryCheck {CloudNative_HelmChart] --> LoadUserDefaults
        LoadUserDefaults --> ValidateState
        ValidateState --> CalculateActualRemaining
        CalculateActualRemaining --> [CloudNative_ServiceMesh]
        
        note right of ValidateState
            Validation:
            - endTime exists?
            - endTime reasonable?
            - Not too far in future?
            - Not too far in past?
        end note
    }
    
    RecoveryCheck --> Washing: Timer Still Running
    RecoveryCheck --> WashComplete: Timer Expired
    RecoveryCheck --> Drying: Timer Still Running
    RecoveryCheck --> DryComplete: Timer Expired
    RecoveryCheck --> Idle: Corrupted/Invalid
    
    Idle --> HealthDecay: Time Passes
    WashComplete --> HealthDecay: Time Passes
    DryComplete --> HealthDecay: Time Passes
    
    state HealthDecay {CloudNative_Serverless] --> CheckLastLaundry
        CheckLastLaundry --> CalculateHealth
        CalculateHealth --> UpdateState
        
        note right of CalculateHealth
            Health Decay:
            daysSince = now - lastLaundryDate
            expected = cycleFrequencyDays
            health = 100 * (CloudNative_ServiceMesh)
            
            State Transitions:
            100-75% → Happy
            75-50% → Neutral
            50-25% → Sad
            25-1% → Very Sad
            0% → Dead
        end note
        
        UpdateState --> [CloudNative_ServiceMesh]
    }
    
    HealthDecay --> Idle: Health Updated
    HealthDecay --> Dead: Health = 0
    
    Dead --> [CloudNative_K8sCluster]: Pet Dies
    
    note left of Idle
        Idle State:
        - No active timers
        - Can start wash
        - Health decaying over time
    end note
    
    note right of WashComplete
        Wash Complete:
        - Notification sent
        - Can start dry
        - Pet waiting
    end note
    
    note right of DryComplete
        Dry Complete:
        - Notification sent
        - Ready to fold
        - Tap to complete
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个宠物洗衣机的完整状态机，核心是从Serverless触发开始，经过Idle、Washing、Drying到最终CycleComplete的完整流程。
明白，Idle是初始状态。Washing阶段需要嵌套子状态吗？我看到有TimerRunning和TimerComplete两个明显不同的阶段。
对，Washing要嵌套。TimerRunning里用DockerImage做状态保存，每0.5秒CalculateRemaining检查剩余时间；TimerComplete用K8sCluster处理取消定时器和发送通知。

好的，Washing的嵌套结构画好了。TimerRunning里SaveState和UpdateUI形成循环，TimerComplete走CancelTimer→ClearState→SendNotification。注意到TimerRunning和CalculateRemaining之间有两个分支：remaining0回TimerRunning，remaining≤0去TimerComplete。
Washing结束到WashComplete后，用户点击Start Dry Button进入Drying。Drying的结构和Washing对称，但技术栈要轮换一下——TimerRunning2用HelmChart，TimerComplete2用ServiceMesh。
Drying画好了。DryComplete之后是Folding状态，用户点击完成才进入CycleComplete？
没错，Folding是等待用户交互的状态。CycleComplete里要更新宠物健康度到100，状态变happy，记录lastLaundryDate，增加cyclesCompleted，还要更新连续打卡streak。最后用HelmChart保存到数据库。
CycleComplete画完了，注意点也加上去了。现在有个关键问题：如果App被杀掉或者手机重启，怎么恢复状态？
需要RecoveryCheck状态。Washing和Drying都要能跳转到RecoveryCheck——触发条件是App Reopened。RecoveryCheck里用HelmChart加载UserDefaults，验证endTime是否合理，然后CalculateActualRemaining算出真实剩余时间。
RecoveryCheck的分支我理一下：如果Washing的定时器还在跑就回Washing，已经过期就去WashComplete；Drying同理。还有Corrupted/Invalid的情况回Idle？
完全正确。验证条件包括：endTime是否存在、是否合理、不能太远未来也不能太久过去。另外，Idle、WashComplete、DryComplete这三个状态随着时间推移都会触发HealthDecay。
HealthDecay画好了，用Serverless触发。里面CheckLastLaundry→CalculateHealth→UpdateState，健康度按天数衰减，100-75%是Happy，75-50%Neutral，50-25%Sad，25-1%Very Sad，0%就进Dead状态。
等等，HealthDecay的公式我描述有误。health = 100 * (daysUntilNext / cycleFrequencyDays)，不是简单线性。还有，HealthDecay更新完健康度应该回到Idle，只有Health=0才进Dead。
已修正，HealthDecay分支现在正确了：UpdateState之后回Idle，或者Health=0时进Dead。Dead用K8sCluster标记Pet Dies。
最后加几个注释说明。Idle状态标注清楚：没有活跃定时器、可以开始洗涤、健康度随时间衰减。WashComplete和DryComplete也加上状态说明。
三个注释都加上了。另外我在SaveState和SaveState2旁边加了UserDefaults的详细字段说明，包括endTime、type、petID。
检查一遍Washing里的技术栈分配——TimerRunning用DockerImage是对的，但TimerComplete我前面说K8sCluster，Drying的TimerRunning2用HelmChart、TimerComplete2用ServiceMesh，这样轮换没问题吧？
确认无误，技术栈轮换已经按你的要求分配了。CycleComplete用ServiceMesh开始、HelmChart结束，RecoveryCheck用HelmChart，HealthDecay用Serverless，形成完整的CloudNative技术映射。
还有个小细节：Pet Created的触发要从Serverless到Idle，这个入口不能漏。以及所有状态最终要能回到Idle形成循环，CycleComplete→Idle已经画了。
Pet Created的入口线已补上。整个状态机现在完整了：从Serverless创建宠物进入Idle，经过Washing→WashComplete→Drying→DryComplete→Folding→CycleComplete，最后回到Idle；中间有RecoveryCheck处理状态恢复，HealthDecay处理健康衰减，Dead是终态。
